name: Miso Sauce for Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, heat the safflower oil over medium heat.
2. Add the scallions and garlic. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 3 minutes until fragrant.
3. Transfer the mixture to a medium bowl.
4. Stir in the yellow miso.
5. Slowly add the warmed vegetable stock while continuously stirring.
6. If desired, add more liquid to achieve the desired sauce consistency.
Vegetarian Times, April 1992
